panels.description: The size constraints of the panels.

collapse.description: Emits when a collapsible panel is collapsed.

defaultSize.description: The initial size data of the panels when uncontrolled.

expand.description: Emits when a collapsible panel is expanded.

id.description: The unique identifier of the splitter.

ids.description: The ids of the elements in the splitter. Useful for composition.

keyboardResizeBy.description: The number of pixels to resize the panel by when the keyboard is used.

nonce.description: The nonce for the injected splitter cursor stylesheet.

registry.description: The splitter registry to use for multi-drag support.

resize.description: Emits details when panel sizes are resized.

resizeEnd.description: Emits details when a resize interaction ends.

resizeStart.description: Emits when a resize interaction starts.

size.description: The controlled size data of the panels.

value.description: The splitter machine returned by useSplitter().

id.description: The id of the resize trigger in the form "before:after".

disabled.description: Whether the resize trigger is disabled.
